calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg D (H-optim): stronger unsupervised explorer (RND + ICM) vs sparse z_world actor-critic
items.note: MECH-457 GOV-FANOUT-1 leg D (ALGORITHM axis) -- the empirical discrimination the 747/748/749 portfolio deferred (combined autopsy failure_autopsy_MECH-457-fanout-747-748-749_2026-07-13; lit-pull landed REE_assembly master 5883691b2b: Burda2018 RND, Pathak2017 ICM, Hester2018 DQfD, Ross2011 DAgger, Kang2021 observational). Question: is an EXPERT teacher NECESSARY, or was vanilla policy-gradient exploration merely too WEAK -- would a stronger UNSUPERVISED explorer clear the 1.0 forage floor at D3 without an oracle to clone? Arms (6 = 3 z_world x 1 rung D3_hazard_free + 3 anchors, seeds [42,43,44]): ac_zworld_sparse (the 742 sparse cotrain arm, shaping_coef=0, SAME-RUN baseline + reuse-eligible MINT), ac_zworld_rnd (Random Network Distillation intrinsic + entropy 0.10), ac_zworld_icm (Intrinsic Curiosity Module forward-error + entropy 0.10). NO expert, NO behavior-cloning. z_world ONLY (representation axis already closed by 747/748/749: H-rep refuted, z_world+BC 32.72 > raw+BC 20.93). DIAGNOSTIC -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; route to /failure-autopsy before any governance action; MECH-457 stays candidate/v3_pending, competence_implementation_gap. SELF-ROUTE: any explorer majority supra-floor -> stronger_unsupervised_explorer_clears_floor_exploration_was_the_wall (build a better explorer; RND/ICM viable-but-scale-discounted per Burda/Pathak); both explorers sub-floor while 748 BC passed -> unsupervised_exploration_insufficient_expert_teaching_signal_necessary (build imitation+closed-loop-correction, NOT static BC: DAgger O(eps*T^2) ceiling, DQfD scaffold-then-continued-RL escape); readiness unmet -> substrate_not_ready_requeue. Denominators live per run (742: local_view_greedy 48.05, greedy_oracle 57.2, random_walk 0.933; floor 1.0). NOT a power-bump of the sparse-RL design -- adds a LEARNED intrinsic signal the 742/748 baseline lacked (it already had entropy 0.03 + count-novelty). Do NOT amend the f_dominance_conversion_ceiling substrate_queue entry (autopsy sec8 recommended action=none until this leg decides the build target). GOV-REUSE-1: decisive readout (z_world AC foraging under RND/ICM) recorded in NO prior manifest (742 sparse-only, 748 dense-teacher, 747/749 raw-view) -> run. Re-derive brake does NOT fire (0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies on MECH-457). MINT: ac_zworld_sparse emitted reuse-eligible (mint-as-you-go; OFF computation in fan.train_zworld_ac_shaped shaping_coef=0 under _lib/**); separate order-independent mint skipped eyes-open (this leg self-mints + is high-priority; no sibling needs the z_world-sparse baseline before it lands). Concurrent V3-EXQ-750 (nervous-proskuriakova) is a DIFFERENT MECH-457/INV-088 strategy-diversity readout -- no overlap. Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-13.

items.title: MECH-457 bias_head_baseline MINT -- order-independent reuse insurance for the V3-EXQ-742 OFF arm (724-A0 all-ON; D0+D3; baseline)
items.note: Separate baseline mint for the MECH-457 actor-critic ON/OFF lineage's reusable OFF arm (bias_head_baseline = 724-A0 all-ON incompetence control), banked ORDER-INDEPENDENTLY of V3-EXQ-742. Both this mint and the 742 consumer build the OFF cell + its fingerprint from the ONE shared module experiments/_lib/baselines/exq742_mech457_bias_head_baseline.py (run_off_cell + off_path_config_slice), include_driver_script_in_hash=False on both sides -> arm_fingerprint MATCHES by construction (verified: reuse-lookup key 4c316086... identical consumer-vs-mint). PINNED ree-cloud-4 (linux-x86_64-py3.10) so the fingerprint is the reusable cloud machine-class (a Mac mint would be a dead-on-arrival different class). LOW priority (5) so real science preempts. experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[] -> excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING. A future MECH-457 iteration cites this run_id via reuse_baseline_from to skip re-training the byte-identical OFF arm. Corrects the parent session's initial wrongly-skipped separate mint (terminality unknowable; first-of-lineage is the paradigm mint case). Smoke PASS + validate_experiments --strict OK 2026-07-12.

items.title: MECH-457/INV-088 single-step strategy-diversity readout on the 2x2 representation x reward-density factorial (742/747/748/749)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic; excluded from governance scoring; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; routes to /failure-autopsy). Adds a single-step strategy-diversity readout (H_greedy greedy-action-histogram entropy / effective_actions=2^H / mean per-step softmax hedging-entropy) to the GOV-FANOUT-1 2x2 (742=zworld+sparse FAIL, 747=raw+sparse FAIL, 748=zworld+dense PASS, 749=raw+dense PASS). Reruns all 4 RL cells verbatim via mech457_fanout (deterministic under fixed seeds). GOV-REUSE-1: the decisive readout (per-step strategy diversity) is recorded in NO prior manifest -- 742/747/748/749 saved only aggregate competence + per_episode_resources, no per-step actions or policy weights, and experiments/_lib/arm_fingerprint is Phase-0 emit-only, so nothing was reusable (checked 748/749 flat manifests 2026-07-13) -> run. Decisive test: does strategy diversity rise with z_world differentiation INDEPENDENT of the competence gain -- cleanest matched-competence pair is 748 (zworld+dense PASS) vs 749 (raw+dense PASS). SINGLE-STEP ONLY (no multi-step committed-trajectory metric; substrate cannot sustain multi-step commitment). RE-DERIVE BRAKE (Step 2.5b): 0 substrate_ceiling/non_contributory autopsies on MECH-457 and INV-088 -> not braked; additionally exempt as a new EXQ number + a diagnostic discriminating WHY (representation-ceiling channel vs not), not a lettered power-bump. ethics_preflight all-false/allow (V3 foraging, no self-model). A PASS ESCALATES to registering an ARC-065 child (representation-ceiling channel) or an INV-088 behavioural-consequence claim, adjudicated by /failure-autopsy first. Low priority (2) + affinity any (cloud) -- expensive z_world cotrain (~7h); must not preempt real science. Concurrent V3-EXQ-751 (heuristic-burnell fanout leg D) is a DIFFERENT MECH-457 competence question -- no overlap. Smoke PASS (dry-run end-to-end; instrument validated: random_walk H_greedy 2.25/eff 4.76, structured anchors ~1.87) + validate_experiments --strict --paths OK 2026-07-13.
